title: TickerInput
description: Fields available on each ticker object passed to stock agents. Enrichment fields are populated before the pipeline runs and are optional (may be absent if enrichment failed).

symbol.description: Ticker symbol — same as name, present after enrichment.

candle_frequency.description: yfinance interval used to fetch candles (e.g. '1d', '1h', '30m').

candle_count.description: Number of OHLCV candles fetched for this ticker.

enrichment_status.description: Whether enrichment succeeded. If 'failed', all indicator fields below will be absent.

ema_20.description: 20-period Exponential Moving Average of closing price.

ema_50.description: 50-period Exponential Moving Average of closing price.

ema_200.description: 200-period Exponential Moving Average of closing price.

rsi_14.description: 14-period Relative Strength Index. Range: 0–100. Above 70 = overbought, below 30 = oversold.

atr_%.description: 14-period Average True Range expressed as a percentage of the current price. Measures volatility.

prev_day_high.description: Previous trading day's intraday high price.

prev_day_low.description: Previous trading day's intraday low price.

volume.description: Previous trading day's total volume (number of shares traded).

fifty_two_week_high.description: Highest intraday price over the last 252 trading days (~1 year).

fifty_two_week_low.description: Lowest intraday price over the last 252 trading days (~1 year).

prev_session_vwap.description: Volume-Weighted Average Price for the previous completed trading session.

volume_profile.description: Volume Profile over the last 252 trading days (~1 year). Shows price levels where the most trading activity occurred.

poc.description: Point of Control — price level with the highest traded volume.

vah.description: Value Area High — upper boundary of the price range containing 70% of volume.

val.description: Value Area Low — lower boundary of the price range containing 70% of volume.
